mnemonics: WOODS and EDDINS: Walk Outside, Observe Details, Develop Images, See Light (acronym for their names and the core process of digital image processing)
keyPoints: Authors of 'Digital Image Processing', a foundational textbook in the field.
The book covers core techniques like image enhancement, restoration, compression, and segmentation.
Their work provides the theoretical and practical basis for many modern computer vision algorithms.
commonMistakes: Confusing Woods & Eddins with Gonzalez & Woods (another seminal author/pair in the field).
Assuming the module is about their personal research rather than the textbook's content.
Overlooking the importance of the mathematical foundations presented in their work for understanding more complex CV topics.
